title: buda rupestris
intro: Buda rupestris, also known as rock jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a fragrant, flowering plant native to South Africa, with delicate white flowers that bloom at night and fade by morning. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Buda rupestris include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. Buda rupestris is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are said to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
